title: Detect Undiagnosed Hypertension
summary: Review repeated elevated blood pressure evidence and flag likely hypertension that is not documented on the active problem list.
problem_statement: Repeated elevated blood pressures may not translate into an active diagnosis or timely follow-up.

inputs.name: vitals_summary
inputs.description: Recent blood pressure measurements and dates.

rule_sets.summary: If multiple elevated blood pressures occur without a matching diagnosis, flag for clinician review.

actions.label: Draft blood pressure follow-up plan
actions.description: Prepare a confirmation and follow-up recommendation.

examples: Does this patient look like undiagnosed hypertension?
